SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk.util

Interface RiskListener

All Known Subinterfaces:
IAgent
All Known Implementing Classes:
DummyAgent, FSMAgent, HumanAgent, NeuralQAgent, RandomAgent, RiskAnimationListener, StaticAgent, TrainerAgent, TrustlessRiskListener
public interface RiskListener
Callback interface for game events.

You can register your own listeners via Game.registerListener(RiskListener). In practice, you will never need to do this, since your IAgent implementation already extends the risk listener interface. We register that listener for you, so you can simply override specific events as needed.

This can be used to gather information about how other players are playing the game.

All methods are called on the game thread.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onActionApplied(GameView game, int agentIdx, Action action, boolean success)
    Called after any action is applied (attack, fortify, redeem, no-op).
    default void
    onArmyPlaced(GameView game, int agentIdx, Territory territory)
    Called each time an army is placed during setup.
    default void
    onGameEnd(GameView game)
    Called when the game ends.
    default void
    onSetupComplete(GameView game)
    Called when Game.setup() completes.
    default void
    onSetupStart(GameView game)
    Called when Game.setup() begins.
    default void
    onTurnEnd(GameView game, int agentIdx)
    Called when a turn ends.
    default void
    onTurnStart(GameView game, int agentIdx)
    Called at the start of each agent's turn.

  • Method Details

    • onSetupStart

      default void onSetupStart(GameView game)
      Called when Game.setup() begins.
      Parameters:
      game - The game before any setup happens.

    • onArmyPlaced

      default void onArmyPlaced(GameView game, int agentIdx, Territory territory)
      Called each time an army is placed during setup.
      Parameters:
      game - The game state AFTER the army is placed.
      agentIdx - The idx of the agent who placed the army.
      territory - Which territory the agent placed the army in.

    • onSetupComplete

      default void onSetupComplete(GameView game)
      Called when Game.setup() completes.
      Parameters:
      game - The game state AFTER the army is placed.

    • onTurnStart

      default void onTurnStart(GameView game, int agentIdx)
      Called at the start of each agent's turn.
      Parameters:
      game - The game state BEFORE an agent's turn starts.
      agentIdx - Whose turn it is.

    • onActionApplied

      default void onActionApplied(GameView game, int agentIdx, Action action, boolean success)
      Called after any action is applied (attack, fortify, redeem, no-op).
      Parameters:
      game - The game state AFTER the action has been applied.
      agentIdx - The idx of the agent who did the action.
      action - The actual action they took.
      success - Whether any special event occurred from the action. For example, in a AttackAction, this will be true when the attack fully CLAIMS the enemy territory, but otherwise returns false.

    • onTurnEnd

      default void onTurnEnd(GameView game, int agentIdx)
      Called when a turn ends.
      Parameters:
      game - The game state AFTER the turn has ended and all actions have resolved.
      agentIdx - Whose turn it was.

    • onGameEnd

      default void onGameEnd(GameView game)
      Called when the game ends.
      Parameters:
      game - The game state AFTER a terminal state has been reached.
